title: Coding with ADK to beat a text adventure game
summary: Google Cloud Tech hosted a livestream demonstrating how to use the Agent Development Kit (ADK) to solve a text adventure game. Speakers Tilde Thurium and Abdel Sghiouar showed practical applications of agent development through a game-based example.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech runs a livestream in which Tilde Thurium and Abdel Sghiouar use the Agent Development Kit (ADK) to solve a text adventure game. The game serves as a concrete example for building and orchestrating agents, touching on agent orchestration and multi-agent systems. The format demonstrates ADK through a working task rather than abstract description.
